ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the job belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the job */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the job in the execution queue */,
  "main_time" REAL /* Time spent on main computation (seconds) */,
  "divg_time" REAL /* Time spent on divergence computation (seconds) */,
  "mass_time" REAL /* Time spent on mass computation (seconds) */,
  "velo_time" REAL /* Time spent on velocity computation (seconds) */,
  "pres_time" REAL /* Time spent on pressure computation (seconds) */,
  "wall_time" REAL /* Time spent on wall computation (seconds) */,
  "dump_time" REAL /* Time spent on dump computation (seconds) */,
  "part_time" REAL /* Time spent on particle computation (seconds) */,
  "radi_time" REAL /* Time spent on radiation computation (seconds) */,
  "fire_time" REAL /* Time spent on fire computation (seconds) */,
  "comm_time" REAL /* Time spent on communication (seconds) */,
  "blnk_time" REAL /* Time spent on blanking (seconds) */,
  "hvac_time" REAL /* Time spent on HVAC (seconds) */,
  "geom_time" REAL /* Time spent on geometry computation (seconds) */,
  "vege_time" REAL /* Time spent on vegetation computation (seconds) */,
  "total_time_used" REAL /* Total time used for the job (seconds) */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage during job execution */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage during job execution */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Average disk usage during job execution */,
  "network_usage" REAL /* Average network usage during job execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the job */,
  "submit_time" TEXT /* Time when the job was submitted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the job started executing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the job completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the job */,
  "job_status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the job (e.g., 0 for success, 1 for failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the job failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that depends on another job */,
  "depends_on_job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., input, output, both) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_dependencies_depends_on_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("depends_on_job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_dependencies_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., job completion, job failure, resource overuse) */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that used the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., CPU, memory, disk, network) */,
  "usage_value" REAL /* Value of the resource usage */,
  "usage_time" TEXT /* Time when the resource was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)
